（新书求关注加书架评论催更)
星球资源枯竭，世界意志觉醒，自我修复创伤，灾难降临，生存成为人类的唯一目标。
星际文明联盟以促进文明与人类进化为目的降临末日领航游戏。却带了一个喜欢老电影的游戏主持。

宅女江夜雨，梦中惊坐起，觉醒源天赋，以弱女之身引领人类文明前行。
极热，虫灾，暴雨，海啸，瘟疫，火山，酸雨，极夜，毒雾，极寒直至星球复苏。

恶毒后母，无良渣爹纷纷落马。
黑恶势力，杀手组织灰飞烟灭。
资本世家，敌对他国斩落马下。
舰队起航，星海皆在长刀所向。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ce3d4db45d416c22cd682504bf79881a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"公子老五","author_id":"","book_id":"7568526880299551768","book_name":"末日重启：我为文明领航先锋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1173人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568526936557748760","read_count":"1173","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"653499"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"301","tags":"科幻末世,末世,空间,无CP,星际","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ce3d4db45d416c22cd682504bf79881a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315083&x-signature=kL1%2B3g0P%2F4PpKUoIs3RH96t4d04%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111216597155","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"87"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206112338A90F2A909AD2D4B23C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":912},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_di
